mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.board_code, b.board_name, b.group_id, bg.group_name, b.use_comment, b.use_file, b.max_file_count, b.use_secret, b.page_size, b.template_code, b.use_editor, b.created_at, b.created_by, b.updated_at, b.updated_by, b.deleted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_post p WHERE p.board_id = b.id AND p.deleted = 0) AS post_count FROM board b LEFT JOIN board_group bg ON b.group_id = bg.id AND bg.deleted = 0 WHERE b.deleted = 0 ORDER BY b.id ASC

SELECT b.id, b.board_code, b.board_name, b.group_id, bg.group_name, b.use_comment, b.use_file, b.max_file_count, b.use_secret, b.page_size, b.template_code, b.use_editor, b.created_at, b.created_by, b.updated_at, b.updated_by, b.deleted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_post p WHERE p.board_id = b.id AND p.deleted = 0) AS post_count FROM board b LEFT JOIN board_group bg ON b.group_id = bg.id AND bg.deleted = 0 WHERE b.group_id = #{groupId} AND b.deleted = 0 ORDER BY b.id ASC

SELECT b.id, b.board_code, b.board_name, b.group_id, bg.group_name, b.use_comment, b.use_file, b.max_file_count, b.use_secret, b.page_size, b.template_code, b.use_editor, b.created_at, b.created_by, b.updated_at, b.updated_by, b.deleted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_post p WHERE p.board_id = b.id AND p.deleted = 0) AS post_count FROM board b LEFT JOIN board_group bg ON b.group_id = bg.id AND bg.deleted = 0 WHERE b.id = #{id} AND b.deleted = 0

SELECT b.id, b.board_code, b.board_name, b.group_id, bg.group_name, b.use_comment, b.use_file, b.max_file_count, b.use_secret, b.page_size, b.template_code, b.use_editor, b.created_at, b.created_by, b.updated_at, b.updated_by, b.deleted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_post p WHERE p.board_id = b.id AND p.deleted = 0) AS post_count FROM board b LEFT JOIN board_group bg ON b.group_id = bg.id AND bg.deleted = 0 WHERE b.board_code = #{boardCode} AND b.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board ( board_code, board_name, group_id, use_comment, use_file, max_file_count, use_secret, page_size, template_code, use_editor, created_at, created_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{boardCode}, #{boardName}, #{groupId}, #{useComment}, #{useFile}, #{maxFileCount}, #{useSecret}, #{pageSize}, #{templateCode}, #{useEditor}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET board_name = #{boardName}, group_id = #{groupId}, use_comment = #{useComment}, use_file = #{useFile}, max_file_count = #{maxFileCount}, use_secret = #{useSecret}, page_size = #{pageSize}, template_code = #{templateCode}, use_editor = #{useEditor}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE board SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT bp.id AS perm_id, bp.board_id, bp.role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, bp.can_create, bp.can_read, bp.can_update, bp.can_delete, bp.created_at AS perm_created_at FROM board_permission bp INNER JOIN role r ON bp.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE bp.board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY r.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_permission ( board_id, role_id, can_create, can_read, can_update, can_delete, created_at ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{roleId}, #{canCreate}, #{canRead}, #{canUpdate}, #{canDelete}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT bp.id AS perm_id, bp.board_id, bp.role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, bp.can_create, bp.can_read, bp.can_update, bp.can_delete, bp.created_at AS perm_created_at FROM board_permission bp INNER JOIN role r ON bp.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE bp.board_id = #{boardId} AND bp.role_id = #{roleId}
